title: Ctenopteris cryptosora

The health benefits of Ctenopteris cryptosora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable asset in traditional medicine. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, Ctenopteris cryptosora is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in rituals and ceremonies for its spiritual significance.
taxonomy: Ctenopteris cryptosora is a species of tree fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Ctenopteris, which is a group of ferns native to New Zealand. The family Dryopteridaceae is a large and diverse family of ferns that are found in many parts of the world. This family is further classified under the order Polypodiales, which includes many species of ferns.
